basics.name: Muhammad Shuja
basics.label: Performance Marketer & Growth Analyst
basics.summary: Performance marketer and growth analyst with 4 years across paid media, marketing analytics, marketing operations, and AI automation. $940K+ cumulative paid media managed across 20+ accounts in 4 markets; 18.6x peak campaign ROAS; built an agency digital division from zero to $850K+ under management; currently applying analyst rigor to a full P&L with AI-automated operations. Engineer's training (B.Eng. Software Engineering), analyst's toolkit (M.S. MIS), marketer's track record.

work.name: Wellborn Ascent
work.summary: Multi-unit retail group, ~$4.2M annual revenue, 3 locations, 14 staff; reporting directly to ownership.
highlights: Built AI-enabled operations system (Claude API, Zapier, Make, Slack interface) replacing 4 roles and cutting $120K in annual payroll
Automated daily close for real-time P&L visibility; bank reconciliation 20 hrs/week to fully automated with 100% discrepancy accountability
Scheduling 4 hrs to 10 min weekly with zero conflicts; payroll 2 hrs to 10 min with zero timecard disputes; reporting 2 hrs/location to 15 min total
Query 60K+ monthly transactions in SQL to surface margin leaks and variance by location and employee
Demand forecasting model: zero stockouts including through a regional supply shortage
Grew highest-margin in-store foodservice line from $800 to $1,500/day (+87%) via menu redesign, staff training, promotional activation
Raised brand compliance audit scores from 60% to 99% across all locations; maintain 99% automation reliability

work.name: PrimaCare Home Healthcare (Dubai)
work.summary: Sole marketer for an at-home healthcare booking platform.
highlights: Grew online appointments +300% in 12 months via end-to-end paid search and paid social management
Built lead-scoring model lifting MQL-to-SQL conversion +28%; blended CAC down 31%
Repeat customer rate +37%; segmented email nurture at 42% average open rate
Geo-targeted campaigns across 200+ localities; built internal WordPress CRM cutting appointment scheduling time 75%
Developed brand identity and produced print, web, and social content in-house

work.name: Brandwise Media (Dubai)
work.summary: Built the agency's digital division from zero.
highlights: Scaled to 20+ B2B/B2C accounts with $850K+ cumulative managed media; 189% average client ROAS
Controlled testing program lifted average CTR from 11% to 43%
Full-funnel redesign raised sales-qualified lead rate +30%, inquiries +45%, consultation-to-client conversion +68%, retention +100%
Shipped 12 websites across e-commerce, hospitality, F&B, B2B, edtech; led photographers, designers, writers, SEO specialists

Food Crowd (D2C grocery): funnel rebuild with stage-specific campaigns, GA4 data-driven attribution reallocating ~22% of budget, lifecycle email at ~28% of attributed revenue: ROAS 18.6x, CPA $2.66, AOV $49.52, orders +67%, revenue +42%
Client results: Bagason Industries +225% brand recall; Robostores +22% lead quality; J5 Hotels 77% launch CTR

work.name: Al Aaraf Jewelers (Dubai)
work.summary: Zero-to-one e-commerce launch for a luxury jewelry retailer.
highlights: Built the company's first e-commerce store on Magento: catalog, payments, shipping integrations
Online sales +134% vs pre-launch baseline; page-one rankings on high-competition keywords within 6 months
Bilingual (EN/AR) geo-targeted campaigns lifted off-peak store footfall +39%
Abandoned-cart flows recovered 18% of lost checkouts; email-attributed revenue +52%
Developed MENA expansion plans for Saudi Arabia and Qatar

work.name: Alcium Software (Sheffield, UK)
highlights: Integrated MS Graph API features in C# for CRM serving real estate and government clients
Rebuilt search algorithm; produced SDLC/Agile documentation
